name: Anirban Chatterjee
bio: A silent performer from the Mime Institute circle, interested in everyday gestures and street memories.

name: Mrittika Sen
bio: Writes small poems about buses, rainwater, old para balconies, and the difficult art of staying human.

name: Ritwik Basu
bio: Plays Bengali folk, blues, and half-remembered songs that somehow everyone knows by the chorus.

name: Farah Naaz
bio: Collects neighbourhood stories and performs them as intimate spoken-word theatre.

name: Sohini Dey
bio: Sketches teacups, tram lines, theatre masks, and other proof that a city remembers.

name: Nelabha Banerjee
bio: Plays Bengali folk, blues, and half-remembered songs that somehow everyone knows by the chorus.
